queries.scenario: rental 表(16044 行)无 WHERE 条件,触发 Seq Scan + 100% selectivity
payment 表(16049 行)按 staff_id 过滤但 staff_id 无索引
inventory 表全表扫后按 film_id 过滤(无索引)
rental 与 payment 笛卡尔积前的 payment Seq Scan
film_actor 联结表全扫(film_id 无单独索引,虽然有联合 PK)
address 表按 district(非索引列)过滤
customer 表 active=1 过滤(active 无索引)
payment 表 amount > 10 高 selectivity 过滤(无索引)
rental.return_date IS NULL(高频谓词,缺索引)
customer.email 过滤(email 无索引)
payment.amount 范围(无索引,导致 Seq Scan + Filter)
staff.username 精确匹配(无索引,典型登录场景)
city.city 名精确查(无索引)
film.description 文本扫描
customer→rental→payment→inventory→film 5 表嵌套循环
queries.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS rental_count
FROM customer c
INNER JOIN rental r ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id
INNER JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
INNER JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
INNER JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id
LIMIT 20

queries.scenario: rental ↔ inventory NL(staff_id 无索引时)
queries.sql:
FROM rental r
INNER JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
WHERE r.staff_id = 1
LIMIT 10

queries.scenario: 强制 NL 提示(测试 NL 触发)
queries.sql:
FROM rental r
INNER JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
WHERE r.customer_id BETWEEN 1 AND 10

queries.scenario: film→film_actor→actor 三表链
queries.sql:
FROM film f
INNER JOIN film_actor fa ON f.film_id = fa.film_id
INNER JOIN actor a ON fa.actor_id = a.actor_id
WHERE f.rating = 'PG-13'
LIMIT 20

queries.scenario: 大表 customer→address NL(address_id 无高效索引时)
大表 Hash Join + 低 work_mem 触发 spill
queries.sql:
SELECT r.rental_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
FROM rental r
INNER JOIN customer c ON r.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE r.rental_date >= '2022-06-01';
RESET work_mem

queries.scenario: 三表 Hash Join 链 + 低内存
queries.sql:
SELECT p.payment_id, c.first_name, f.title
FROM payment p
INNER JOIN customer c ON p.customer_id = c.customer_id
INNER JOIN rental r ON p.rental_id = r.rental_id
INNER JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
INNER JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id
WHERE p.amount > 5.00;
RESET work_mem

queries.scenario: 4 表 Hash Join
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM rental r
JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
JOIN customer c ON r.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN staff s ON r.staff_id = s.staff_id;
RESET work_mem

queries.scenario: 自连接 rental 触发大 Hash
queries.sql:
SELECT r1.rental_id, r2.rental_id
FROM rental r1
INNER JOIN rental r2 ON r1.customer_id = r2.customer_id
WHERE r1.rental_date < r2.rental_date;
RESET work_mem;

-- =============================================================================
-- [MEM-001] Sort spilled to disk — 4 queries
-- =============================================================================

queries.scenario: 大表 ORDER BY 无索引支撑 + 低内存
queries.sql:
SELECT * FROM rental ORDER BY rental_date LIMIT 100;
RESET work_mem

queries.scenario: 大表 ORDER BY amount
queries.sql:
SELECT * FROM payment ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 50;
RESET work_mem

queries.scenario: GROUP BY + ORDER BY 组合排序
queries.sql:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(amount) AS total
FROM payment
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20;
RESET work_mem

queries.scenario: 多列 ORDER BY 触发 external sort
大表 Hash Join 峰值内存高
queries.sql:
FROM rental r
INNER JOIN payment p ON r.customer_id = p.customer_id
INNER JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id

queries.scenario: 全表 HashAggregate 内存峰值
queries.sql:
FROM payment
GROUP BY customer_id

queries.scenario: 多表大 Hash Join
queries.sql:
FROM film f
JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id
JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id
JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
GROUP BY f.title
LIMIT 30;

-- =============================================================================
-- [SORT-003] Duplicate sort — 3 queries
-- =============================================================================

queries.scenario: 嵌套 ORDER BY(外层 + 内层各排一次)
UNION + ORDER BY 触发两层 sort
queries.sql:
UNION ALL
SELECT rental_id, customer_id FROM rental WHERE staff_id = 2
ORDER BY 1, 2

queries.scenario: DISTINCT + ORDER BY 不同字段
强制 Hash Join 大表驱动,explain 应包含 Broadcast/Redistribute
queries.sql:
FROM rental r, customer c
WHERE r.customer_id = c.customer_id

queries.scenario: payment 与 customer 联接
queries.sql:
FROM payment p, customer c
WHERE p.customer_id = c.customer_id

queries.scenario: 嵌套子查询触发多次 broadcast
queries.sql:
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental r WHERE r.customer_id = c.customer_id) AS cnt
FROM customer c
WHERE c.active = 1
LIMIT 20;

-- =============================================================================
-- [EST-001] Severe row underestimation — 4 queries (需 stale stats)
-- =============================================================================

queries.scenario: 删 stats 后严重低估 payment 行数
删 stats 后 rental 估算偏差
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental WHERE return_date IS NULL

queries.scenario: 删 stats 后 customer 估算偏差
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE active = 1

queries.scenario: 删 stats 后 inventory 估算偏差
删 stats 后误选 NL(应该选 Hash)
queries.sql:
SELECT /*+ nestloop(p c) */ COUNT(*)
FROM payment p, customer c
WHERE p.customer_id = c.customer_id

queries.scenario: 删 stats 后 rental-inventory 选 NL
queries.sql:
SELECT r.rental_id, i.store_id
FROM rental r, inventory i
WHERE r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id

queries.scenario: 删 stats 后 film_actor 误选 NL
customer_id integer 字段用字符串比较
staff_id 与 '1' 字符串比较
address_id 整数与字符串
film_id 数字字符串混合比较
film.title 前导通配符 LIKE
actor.last_name 前导通配符
customer.email 前导通配符
复杂表达式阻止谓词下推
queries.sql:
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM rental_date) = 2022
LIMIT 10

queries.scenario: 函数包裹索引列,阻止下推
算术运算阻止下推
复杂查询产生多层 Streaming 节点
queries.sql:
FROM film f
JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id
JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id
JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
WHERE f.rating = 'PG'
GROUP BY f.title
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

queries.scenario: 多层联接 + 子查询
queries.sql:
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental r WHERE r.customer_id = c.customer_id) AS rental_cnt,
       (SELECT SUM(amount) FROM payment p WHERE p.customer_id = c.customer_id) AS total_paid
FROM customer c
WHERE c.active = 1
LIMIT 10

queries.scenario: CTE + 多层联接
queries.sql:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(amount) AS total
  FROM payment
  GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT c.first_name, c.last_name, cs.cnt, cs.total
FROM customer c
JOIN cust_stats cs ON c.customer_id = cs.customer_id
WHERE cs.total > 30
LIMIT 20;

-- =============================================================================
-- [PART-001] Partition pruning failure — 4 queries
-- payment 表按月分 7 区(2022-01 到 2022-07)
-- =============================================================================

queries.scenario: payment_date 用函数包装,无法分区裁剪
payment_date IS NULL 不会裁剪
payment_date 用 OR 拆分,部分无法裁剪
queries.sql: WHERE payment_date >= '2022-03-01' OR customer_id = 100

queries.scenario: payment_date 跨全部分区,正确裁剪为全部
customer 主查询 + 相关 rental 子查询
queries.sql:
(SELECT MAX(rental_date) FROM rental r WHERE r.customer_id = c.customer_id) AS last_rental
FROM customer c
WHERE c.active = 1
LIMIT 20

queries.scenario: film 主查询 + 相关 film_actor 子查询
queries.sql:
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM film_actor fa WHERE fa.film_id = f.film_id) AS actor_cnt
FROM film f
WHERE f.rating = 'PG'
LIMIT 20

queries.scenario: payment 主查询 + 相关子查询(嵌套两层)
queries.sql:
(SELECT SUM(amount) FROM payment p2 WHERE p2.customer_id = p.customer_id AND p2.payment_date <= p.payment_date) AS running_total
FROM payment p
WHERE p.amount > 5.00
LIMIT 10;

-- =============================================================================
-- [SUBQ-006] Correlated subquery self-update — 2 queries
-- =============================================================================

queries.scenario: rental.return_date 通过相关子查询自更新
queries.sql:
SET return_date = (
  SELECT MAX(payment_date)
  FROM payment p
  WHERE p.rental_id = r.rental_id
)
WHERE r.return_date IS NULL

queries.scenario: customer.active 通过 rental 计数自更新
film_id IN (...) 1000 个值
customer_id IN 大列表
普通 SELECT 触发 Row Adapter / Vector Adapter 切换
queries.sql:
FROM customer c
JOIN rental r ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id
JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id
WHERE c.active = 1
LIMIT 20

queries.scenario: 聚合查询触发 Row Adapter
queries.sql:
FROM customer c
JOIN payment p ON c.customer_id = p.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id
LIMIT 20

queries.scenario: 多表连接混合引擎
queries.sql:
FROM film f, film_actor fa, actor a, inventory i, rental r, customer c
WHERE f.film_id = fa.film_id
  AND fa.actor_id = a.actor_id
  AND f.film_id = i.film_id
  AND i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id
  AND r.customer_id = c.customer_id
LIMIT 10;

-- =============================================================================
-- [AGG-001] Wrong aggregate strategy — 2 queries
-- =============================================================================

queries.scenario: 大数据量 GROUP BY 走 GroupAggregate 而非 HashAggregate
queries.sql:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) FROM rental GROUP BY customer_id LIMIT 20;
RESET enable_sort

queries.scenario: payment GROUP BY 排序聚合
大 GROUP BY + 低 work_mem
queries.sql:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*), SUM(amount), AVG(amount), MAX(amount), MIN(amount)
FROM payment
GROUP BY customer_id;
RESET work_mem

queries.scenario: 多列 GROUP BY
queries.sql:
SELECT customer_id, staff_id, COUNT(*), SUM(amount)
FROM payment
GROUP BY customer_id, staff_id;
RESET work_mem;

-- =============================================================================
-- [DIST-001] Poor distribution column — 2 queries
-- 注: 单节点下主要观察 explain 节点,真实分布键问题需多节点
-- =============================================================================

queries.scenario: payment 无分布键提示,触发重分布
queries.sql:
FROM payment p
JOIN customer c ON p.customer_id = c.customer_id
LIMIT 20

queries.scenario: rental 无分布键提示
按 customer_id 聚合,数据分布不均(部分客户消费多)
queries.sql:
FROM payment
GROUP BY customer_id
HAVING SUM(amount) > 30
LIMIT 10

queries.scenario: rental 按 staff_id 聚合(staff 数量少,数据偏斜)
删 stats 后统计列数为 0
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment WHERE amount > 5.00

queries.scenario: 删 stats 后 rental 估算异常
7 层以上嵌套查询
多层 CTE 嵌套
queries.sql:
t2 AS (SELECT t1.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t1 JOIN rental r ON t1.customer_id = r.customer_id GROUP BY t1.customer_id),
     t3 AS (SELECT t2.customer_id, t2.cnt, COALESCE(p.total, 0) AS total FROM t2 LEFT JOIN (SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) AS total FROM payment GROUP BY customer_id) p ON t2.customer_id = p.customer_id)
SELECT * FROM t3 WHERE total > 20 LIMIT 10;

-- =============================================================================
-- [HEALTHY] Healthy cases — 15 queries(不应触发任何规则,用于测误报率)
-- =============================================================================

queries.scenario: 小表 Seq Scan 是合理的(actor 200 行)
category 表全表(16 行,绝对合理)
country 表(109 行,全表 OK)
language 表(6 行)
film 主键点查
customer 主键点查
actor 主键点查
payment 主键点查(分区裁剪生效)
经典 Sakila 已优化查询:逾期未还
queries.sql:
CONCAT(customer.last_name, ', ', customer.first_name) AS customer,
    address.phone,
    film.title
FROM rental
    INNER JOIN customer ON rental.customer_id = customer.customer_id
    INNER JOIN address ON customer.address_id = address.address_id
    INNER JOIN inventory ON rental.inventory_id = inventory.inventory_id
    INNER JOIN film ON inventory.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE rental.return_date IS NULL
    AND rental_date < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY title
LIMIT 5

queries.scenario: payment 按月分区裁剪正确
全文检索使用 GIN 索引
film 索引列范围查(rating)
film 索引列范围查(language_id)
payment 索引列范围查(customer_id)
rental 索引列精确查(inventory_id)
